title: Supply Chain Digitization: The Impact of eLMIS in Zambia — Transition Ceremony
excerpt: At the eLMIS Transition Ceremony, evaluation results showed Facility Edition sites averaging 72% on-time reporting (vs. 70% for Central Edition), a 58.1% increase in average Central Edition user sessions, declining expiry rates, and emergency order rates held below 2.5% across 1,707 facilities.

title: eLMIS Central Edition v9.4 Released
excerpt: Introduces AMC-based colour alerts on Requisition & Reporting forms, faster Analytics module load times, and bug fixes for the Equipment inventory module.

title: CHW Mobile App Now Live in All 10 Provinces
excerpt: The Community Health Worker / Satellite Site mobile app has completed rollout nationwide, enabling last-mile stock reporting from over 900 community sites.

title: Scheduled Maintenance – Central Edition Production
excerpt: Production environment will be unavailable Saturday 20 June, 22:00–02:00 CAT for a database upgrade. The Test environment remains available throughout.

title: Refresher Training: Requisition & Reporting (R&R) Workflow
excerpt: Provincial focal point training on the updated R&R submission workflow and new stock-below-minimum alerts is now available on the Tools & Guides page.

title: eLMIS Facility Edition v6.2 – Batch & Expiry Alerts
excerpt: Facility Edition now surfaces batch number and expiry date on every commodity line, with automatic flags for items nearing expiry.

title: ZeLISA Assistant Launched
excerpt: Meet ZeLISA, the Zambia eLMIS Logistics Intelligence and Supply Chain Agent — available now to help answer supply chain, logistics and support questions.
